highlights: [2026-05-28 20:13] IP Prime: Hey Pratik! 👋 Kya haal hai bhai? IP Prime is back and ready! Batao aaj ka plan kya hai, kya naya set karna hai?

[2026-05-28 20:15] IP Prime: Arey, perfect boss! Chalo fir, ab jaldi se batao, college ke documents ka plan finalize karna hai ya seedha coding mein dive karein?

[2026-05-28 20:15] IP Prime: Koi tension nahi bhai, simple list deta hoon: 10th aur 12th ki marksheet, Leaving ya Transfer Certificate aur Domicile Certificate - yeh basic toh pakka lagenge. Baaki college specific details dekh lenge
[2026-05-28 20:16] Pratik Sir: O kay I want for eng ine ering col lege ju st make save the m in ver ted and save fi le name with college details.

[2026-05-28 20:16] IP Prime: Done, bhai! Engineering college ke liye documents ki puri list bana ke `college_details.txt` mein save kar di hai. Check kar lo `C:\Users\thora\Downloads\IP Given\code\` mein.
